facts.statement: The highest-ranked features are fibrosis, inflammatory, proliferative, and interferon-related programs, while nuisance covariates such as batch score remain much lower in importance.
The dominant feature effects point in biologically coherent directions: fibrosis, inflammatory, and interferon signals increase predicted response, while proliferative activity suppresses it.

design_notes: Separate importance magnitude from effect direction so ranking and biological interpretation are not conflated.
Keep nuisance covariates in view but visually subordinate to biologically meaningful features.
Use a zero-centered directional panel so positive and negative effects can be read without ambiguity.
